global_context.scene_description: A photorealistic close-up of a man's hands opening a brown leather bifold wallet over a kitchen counter. The wallet is open and visible — instead of being empty or deflated, it's clearly intact: a small stack of $20 bills tucked in the cash slot, several credit cards in their slots, a folded receipt sticking up. The wallet looks NORMAL, not depleted. A thumb is gently lifting the cash slot to peek inside. In the upper-right of the frame, softly out of focus, a brand-new outdoor AC condenser unit is visible through a kitchen window — visibly clean, modern, NOT old. Soft warm morning light from camera-right. The visual story: 'I just paid for a new AC and my wallet is still here.' No text, no logos, no overlay graphics. Photorealistic, shot on 50mm lens.

composition.framing: close-up on the wallet held open in the hands
